# serafall-venice-image-gen
Description: Generate cinematic/realism images via Venice API with model selection (flux-2-pro, lustify-sdxl, hunyuan-image-v3, etc.)
Source: project
Scripts: generate.sh
This skill allows generating high-quality images through the Venice AI API. It supports multiple models and is designed for cinematic and photorealistic output. The main script is generate.sh.
